seed_instruction: I am planning to start a book club with some friends. Can you write an email invitation for the same?
org_constraint: The email should consist of exactly three paragraphs.
new_constraint: The email must contain a minimum of 200 words, with each paragraph limited to a maximum of 60 words.
instruction: I am planning to start a book club with some friends. Can you write an email invitation for the same? The email should consist of exactly three paragraphs. The email must contain a minimum of 200 words, with each paragraph limited to a maximum of 60 words.
response:
Subject: Exciting New Book Club for Us to Join

Dear friends, I have been thinking about us lately and how we could deepen our conversations through shared reading. The world of literature is vast, yet often lonely, so why not explore it together in a warm, inviting space designed just for our unique camaraderie? It feels like time has passed since we last discussed plot twists or character arcs over coffee, making this a perfect opportunity to reconnect while doing something we all genuinely love. I hope you can join me in launching this wonderful tradition that will bring joy and intellectual stimulation to our friendship circle every single month without fail.

We are aiming to meet bi-weekly at my local library cafe, where we will gather around cozy tables with fresh pastries and hot drinks ready whenever we arrive. Our first session is scheduled for the fifth week from now, where we will begin by selecting an excellent debut novel that promises thrilling adventures and deep emotional resonance for everyone involved. We plan to spend half an hour reviewing the previous chapters, followed by two hours of lively debate, sharing personal interpretations, and perhaps even watching related clips on streaming platforms if the book mentions modern adaptations that capture our attention perfectly during our meetings here today. Please let me know your schedule soon so we can ensure we have enough seats reserved for our group comfortably among other patrons walking by right outside the windows now.

Your enthusiasm will make this journey truly unforgettable as we navigate themes ranging from timeless romance to thought-provoking sci-fi narratives together throughout the coming seasons. Remember, there are no rules about finishing pages quickly; instead, focus on enjoying the story unfolding before us and hearing diverse perspectives from each of our brilliant minds present here tonight already excited to start writing down ideas. If you have any allergies, dietary restrictions, or specific book preferences, please share them with me individually so I can plan accordingly while ensuring everyone feels included and valued within our chosen community moving forward in 2024 onwards until further notice. Looking forward to seeing you soon!<|im_end|>
